wlt_boundary_rule: WLT is CONTRACT_ONLY placeholder — no WLT runtime until activation
acceptance_commands: pnpm run foundation:gate && pnpm contracts:lint && pnpm run guard:matrix:v3 && pnpm runtime:all

wlt_boundary_rule: No financial data in store discovery
tests_required: store listing|store detail 404|store filters|controller states|cross-surface dependencies
donor_sources_allowed: ADAPT_NORMALIZE:dsh/store handlers if no old ports
blocked_sources: port 8080 as host|memory repo stores|mock store data|partner-field-captain DSH-001 UI
acceptance_commands: pnpm runtime:all && Invoke-RestMethod 'http://localhost:58080/dsh/stores?limit=10&offset=0' && pnpm run guard:dsh-frontend-shared-ownership && pnpm run guard:dsh-001-cross-surface-dependency-map

wlt_boundary_rule: No financial data in home discovery
tests_required: home discovery returns banners|category filter|empty state
blocked_sources: mock banner data|fake image URLs not via MinIO
rollback_plan: git revert DSH-002 migration and handler

wlt_boundary_rule: Product prices are display-only — no financial calculation in DSH
donor_sources_allowed: ADAPT_NORMALIZE:donor catalog handler if typed and clean
blocked_sources: donor catalog with embedded pricing calculation|mock product data
rollback_plan: git revert DSH-003 migration and handler

wlt_boundary_rule: Cart total is display subtotal only — NOT financial truth
tests_required: cart add item|cart remove item|serviceability check|store closed state
donor_sources_allowed: ADAPT_NORMALIZE:donor cart handler if no financial mutation
blocked_sources: donor cart with ledger/commission|mock serviceability data
rollback_plan: git revert DSH-004 migration and handler

wlt_dependency: REQUIRED — WLT payment-sessions endpoint must exist
wlt_boundary_rule: DSH stores ONLY: paymentSessionId|paymentStatus|financialReference — NO financial computation in DSH
tests_required: checkout intent idempotency|payment session creation|WLT boundary — no DSH ledger
donor_sources_allowed: REFERENCE_ONLY:donor checkout screens as visual reference
blocked_sources: donor checkout with embedded payment/ledger logic|any DSH financial mutation

wlt_dependency: READ — reads paymentStatus from WLT to gate order creation
wlt_boundary_rule: DSH reads WLT paymentStatus only — no WLT mutation from DSH order handlers
tests_required: order creation after payment|partner accept/reject|partner isolation|order cancel timeout
donor_sources_allowed: ADAPT_NORMALIZE:donor order handler if no financial mutation
blocked_sources: donor order creation with embedded payment/ledger logic
rollback_plan: git revert DSH-006 migration and handler

wlt_boundary_rule: DSH tracks deliveryStatus only — COD amount/collection/reconciliation are WLT
tests_required: captain order list|status update|tracking visible to client|failed delivery state
donor_sources_allowed: ADAPT_NORMALIZE:donor captain screens as reference and logic base
blocked_sources: any DSH code for COD collection or delivery commission
rollback_plan: git revert DSH-007 migration and handler

wlt_boundary_rule: No financial data in field readiness
tests_required: field agent isolation|document upload via MinIO|approval triggers store activation
donor_sources_allowed: ADAPT_NORMALIZE:donor field screens if clean and typed
blocked_sources: any fake inspection documents or mock field data
rollback_plan: git revert DSH-008 migration and handler

wlt_dependency: READ — can view paymentStatus and financialReference
wlt_boundary_rule: No WLT mutations from support — read-only WLT references
tests_required: case creation|case update|audit append-only|support cannot trigger WLT mutation
donor_sources_allowed: REFERENCE_ONLY:donor support screens as visual reference
blocked_sources: any support code that triggers WLT financial mutation
rollback_plan: git revert DSH-009 migration and handler

database_scope: NO NEW DSH TABLES — read-only WLT data
wlt_dependency: REQUIRED — WLT must have settlement-summary endpoint
wlt_boundary_rule: STRICTLY READ-ONLY — no ledger entries|no payout triggers|no commission calculation — all financial truth in WLT
tests_required: payment status read|settlement summary read|any write attempt rejected 405
blocked_sources: ANY donor code that mutates ledger/payout/commission/settlement inside DSH
